title: racosperma aulacocarpum subsp. fruticosum
intro: Racosperma aulacocarpum subsp. fruticosum, also known as Acacia fruticosa, is a shrub or small tree native to Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health issues. The plant is valued for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are believed to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Traditionally, the herbal preparations of Racosperma aulacocarpum subsp. fruticosum include infusions of the leaves and bark, which are used to make teas and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
